name: Workers' Comp Coverage for Hearing Aids

mainEntity.name: Are hearing aids covered in Utah workers' comp settlements for NIHL?
mainEntity.text: Are hearing aids covered in Utah workers' comp settlements for NIHL?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, as reasonable medical treatment; awards often include device costs, replacements every 3-5 years, plus fitting/evals under ongoing benefits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah comp mandates employer-paid aids for work-caused loss. Negotiate lifetime provisions in settlements. Carriers cap at 'economy' models; fight for premiums via evidence of need. Murray firms secure better terms avoiding future denials.[3]

description: Yes, as reasonable medical treatment; awards often include device costs, replacements every 3-5 years, plus fitting/evals under ongoing benefits.
